evals.prompt: Run a full security review of boundform using both Claude and Codex
evals.expected_output: Should launch codex review in background, perform Claude's own review, collect both results, and present comparison

evals.prompt: Do a security audit of the npm supply chain scripts in this project
evals.expected_output: Should focus on npm/scripts/ files, still launch Codex for cross-validation, report findings with severity
